binary_event.name: iran_ceasefire_indefinite_extension
sources: Reuters 2026-04-22 01:29 GMT — Trump declares Iran ceasefire extension with Hormuz strait still blocked
NYT 2026-04-21 17:08 GMT — Trump Extends Iran Cease-Fire Before Deadline Expires; Vance's Trip Is on Hold
Detroit News 2026-04-21 21:46 GMT — Trump announces indefinite extension of ceasefire as Iran stalls negotiations
Al Jazeera 2026-04-21 21:40 GMT — Trump announces Iran ceasefire extension but says blockade remains
binary_event.note: Resolved 2026-04-22 11:38 UTC. 4 independent sources confirm Trump granted INDEFINITE ceasefire extension. No fixed deadline. RESIDUAL FRICTION (tracked separately, not a binary): Hormuz attacks ESCALATING post-extension (Tradewinds Apr 22 06:15 ship 'heavy bridge damage' from Iranian vessel; WaPo Apr 22 10:21 'more ships attacked after extension'); Iran calling extension 'ploy' (Türkiye Today Apr 22 09:44); Iran refusing talks until blockade lifted (Express Tribune Apr 22 09:56); Vance Islamabad trip ON HOLD (NYT). Net: deadline-anchored binary REMOVED. Watchlist re-frames from 'spike on deadline collapse' to 'spike on fresh Hormuz strike escalation or formal Iran walkout'.
